stories.title: **Headline:** Oklahoma vs. No. 6 Arkansas — Game 1 Tonight on ESPN2, Wells HR Watch Begins

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Oklahoma (40-5) hosts No. 6 Arkansas tonight at Love's Field. 🥎

Game 1 moved to 5:30 PM CT — weather forced the early start.
ESPN2. Matt Schumacker and Amanda Scarborough on the call.

Two losses in four days. Bounce-back time for the Sooners. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
One hour to first pitch. 🥎

No. 1 Oklahoma vs. No. 6 Arkansas.
Love's Field. Norman.
ESPN2 — 5:30 PM CT.

Oklahoma leads the all-time series 29-2 and is 15-1 at home.

Wells is at 31. Arkansas pitching is up next. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells — Six HRs from Immortality, Arkansas Weekend Is Next Chapter

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells needs 6 home runs to become the all-time NCAA single-season HR leader. 🥎

Lauren Espinoza: 37. Arizona. 1995.
That record has stood for 31 years.

Wells is at 31. Oklahoma hosts Arkansas tonight.

History is watching every at-bat. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells HR watch update: 🥎

31 down. 6 to go.

She's batting .383 with 60 RBIs.
Tonight's opponent: Arkansas.

Espinoza's 37-HR record from 1995 is within reach. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska at Minnesota — Huskers Chase Big Ten Title in Friday Opener

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
No. 4 Nebraska is at Minnesota right now. 🥎

33-6. 14-1 Big Ten.
Back-to-back sweeps of Wisconsin and Rutgers.
Coach Rhonda Revelle.

The Huskers are chasing their first Big Ten regular-season title and it's hard to bet against them. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** FSU Senior Weekend Opens vs. UNC — National Seed on the Line at JoAnne Graf

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
FSU Senior Weekend starts tonight at JoAnne Graf Field. 🥎

The Seminoles lost their 25-game win streak to Stanford last week.
Tonight vs. North Carolina. 6 PM. ACCNX.

Then Florida April 22.

The national seed race just got real for FSU. #FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama Hosts Kentucky — Crimson Tide Eyeing Series Win in SEC Race

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
No. 3 Alabama hosts Kentucky tonight at 5 PM CT on ESPN2. 🥎

The Crimson Tide swept Auburn and won a series over Texas this month.
Alabama has 734 points in the NFCA poll — just 13 behind No. 1 Oklahoma.

SEC race is wide open. #RollTide #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** NFCA Week 12 Countdown — Texas Tech Primed to Take No. 1 on April 21

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Before the Bedlam loss, Oklahoma was No. 1 by 2 points. 🥎

OU: 747 pts. Texas Tech: 745 pts.
OU is now 40-5. TTech is 40-3.
Canady is 17-2.

NFCA Week 12 poll drops April 21.

Who takes No. 1? #CollegeSoftball #TexasTech

stories.title: **Headline:** 2026 WCWS National Seed Race — The Projected Top 8 Entering Week 12

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
2026 WCWS national seed race — who's in the top 8? 🥎

1. Oklahoma (40-5)
2. Texas Tech (40-3)
3. Alabama
4. Nebraska (33-6)
5. Texas
6. Arkansas (35-6)
7. FSU
8. Tennessee

Bubble: UCLA, Virginia Tech, Duke, Washington

This weekend reshuffles everything. #CollegeSoftball #WCWS
